title: Reflex VLA — embodiment config
description: Per-robot config: action space, normalization, gripper, cameras, control, constraints. Read by reflex serve via --embodiment <name>. See features/01_serve/subfeatures/_rtc_a2c2/per-embodiment-configs.md.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when fields are removed or renamed (additive changes don't bump).

embodiment.description: Embodiment slug. Must match the file name minus .json for presets.

dim.description: Number of action dimensions (typically 6-8 for arms, +1 for gripper).

ranges.description: Per-dim [min, max] hard limits. Length must equal action_space.dim.

normalization.description: Action/state denormalization stats. Lengths must match action_space.dim and state dim respectively (cross-validated outside JSON schema).

gripper.description: Optional. Present for embodiments with a gripper end-effector (arms). Omitted for drones and other gripper-less robots.

component_idx.description: Index into the action vector that controls the gripper.

close_threshold.description: Action value above which gripper is considered 'close'.

inverted.description: If true, low values close the gripper instead of high values.

payload_release.description: Optional. Present for embodiments with a payload-release actuator (drones with delivery, etc.). Mutually exclusive with `gripper` in practice — an embodiment has one end-effector type.

component_idx.description: Index into the action vector that controls payload release.

trigger_threshold.description: Action value above which payload is released.

chunk_size.description: Number of actions in a single inference chunk.

rtc_execution_horizon.description: Integer count of actions to lock during RTC replan. Per ADR 2026-04-25-auto-calibration-architecture decision #8. Legacy fractional values (0 < value < 1) auto-migrate to int(value * chunk_size) at load time with a one-time deprecation warning. Schema v2 will reject fractional values.

max_ee_velocity.description: End-effector velocity cap (m/s for arms; flight speed for aerial).

max_gripper_velocity.description: Gripper open/close velocity cap (rad/s or normalized). Required when `gripper` is present; otherwise omitted.

collision_check.description: Whether the runtime should run a per-step collision check before commanding.
